prospect.Summary: Castro shares many offensive similarities with a young Freddy Galvis. He's a switch-hitter with some pop who hasn't totally figured out how to get to that power in games yet. Galvis, who is a superior defender, figured it out and became a low-OBP, 45 FV type of player, so Castro fits in a tier below that. He may be a placeholder at shortstop.
prospect.TLDR: Castro's 2020 graduation campaign included unexpectedly strong power output. His free-swinging nature keeps his projection in the utility infield/low-end regular realm.

news.headline: Will be aggressive on basepaths
news.news: The Rockies are expecting Castro to be aggressive stealing bases this season,  Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
